Not worth the money.

reviews.text: Confusing and frustrating billing experience. I paid for my subscription on June 17, but was asked to pay again only 8 days later. My account had already reverted to the free version with ads, so it was unclear why I was being charged for a previous billing period and then billed again so soon. While customer support provided an explanation, the billing notifications were misleading and lacked transparency. Spotify should communicate billing issues more clearly to avoid confusing customers.

reviews.replyText: Hi! Thanks for proactively trying some troubleshooting steps. We recommend giving a clean reinstall a try. This is a step above a normal reinstall. You can find steps for your specific device by heading to support.spotify.com and searching "Reinstall". If that doesn't help, contact our CS team under the "Contact Us" section on the same site.

the app is great like easy 5+ stars what holds it back is the free version is just terrific like i can accept the fact there are like 3 ads together each one is like 30 seconds but the fact i can't CHOOSE what i want to listen to only limited amounts daily and i can't change or skip songs also being limited AND my playlist plays songs outside the playlist most of the time cause of the shuffle like what is the point of spending time making a playlist if i am not going to hear the songs i want

Absolute thievery rubbish - will validate you as a student and still charge you the premium rate. Almost $200 a year just to subscribe... That's $1000 every five years, and even then you don't get access for life. Please do not even get me started with how little they pay their artists. Absolutely criminal.

I've been using Spotify for about 15 years and I've never been closer to ditching it entirely. It's painfully slow, overburdened with AI, trying to do too many things until it fails at the basics. As a bare minimum for a media player, I expect to hit Play/Pause and the music plays/pauses. Spotify consistently fails at that, or takes 5-10 seconds to respond. Its cache size is huge and yet it takes forever to load the same playlist I use every day. Way too much bloat.
